cases.prompt: I'm about to touch production, turn on careful mode / safety mode.

assertions.text: Activates safety guardrails so every bash command is checked for destructive patterns via the PreToolUse hook.
Warns before destructive operations like rm -rf, DROP TABLE/DATABASE, git push --force, git reset --hard, and kubectl delete.
Lets the user override each warning and allows safe exceptions like rm -rf node_modules/.next/dist.

cases.prompt: 공유 서버에서 작업하니까 조심해줘. 위험한 명령 실행 전에 경고하는 모드 켜줘.

assertions.text: Returns permissionDecision 'ask' with a warning message when a destructive command is matched.
Notes the guardrails are session-scoped and deactivate when the conversation ends.
Produces a warning prompt before each destructive command rather than blocking outright.
